title: 勝者へ至るエチュード

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the outdoor stage...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Like a swan, I am beauty and might defined!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Whew. Perhaps those steps were too magnificent.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not a single soul has arrived to watch me, but the
mere thought of the crowd crying out my name
sends chills down my spine...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Could it be?! Have you come to see my
performance?!
choice_data_list: Uh, actually, I'm just passing throu—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! There is no need to explain! You
undoubtedly caught a glimpse of me and found
yourself utterly entranced!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was practicing my post-race victory pose! Your
reaction is nothing short of natural!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What did you think? Do you believe it to be a
performance befitting the effervescence that
suffuses a venue after a race?
choice_data_list:
I think just running a victory lap would be
better...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What did you think? Do you believe it to be a
performance befitting the effervescence that
suffuses a venue after a race?
choice_data_list:
I think just running a victory lap would be
better...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A victory lap? Me, the winner, running alone on
the track like the wind...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I see! Yes, that sounds perfectly splendid!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With that victory lap, I shall carve the strength
and beauty of the Overlord into the minds of all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled, I shall start practicing at
once! So commences my victory lap etude!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O takes her leave while waving
goodbye to an imaginary audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Exactly! I knew it was brilliant!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The glorious poses I display on the turf are what
set me apart as the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, time to bring things to a true fever
pitch! Come, don't just stand there! Cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up watching T.M. Opera O practice her
posing for quite some time.
